title: bonamiopsis agrostopolis
side_effects: Bonamiopsis agrostopolis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, in individuals who consume it in excess. Prolonged use of this plant can also lead to allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. In some cases, improper use of Bonamiopsis agrostopolis can cause liver and kidney damage due to its high toxicity levels. If not handled and ingested correctly, it can also lead to seizures and other neurological disorders.
